DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SHELLY SCHROEDER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- O F F C A L E N D A R,
first amended complaint filed on 10/30/2002. (JJM/301) Joseph Vickstein, CSR # 4780

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff, Gordon Property Management and James A. Miller, Esq. represented co-Defendants, Shelly Schroeder and Michael Miller. Also present, Property Manager, Stephanie Gordon. The matter settled per written stipulation read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
